message:
test(what-if): add scenario tests for strong_kill, spare, conflicting evidence

Adds 4 new tests in what_if_explanations.rs covering specific scenarios
from Section 11.15:

- test_scenario_strong_kill: Verifies evidence breakdown with strong
  abandoned/zombie signals and classification direction
- test_scenario_spare_recommendation: Tests useful classification with
  counterfactual analysis showing what would need to change
- test_scenario_conflicting_evidence: Tests mixed signals with positive
  and negative evidence breakdown
- test_scenario_marginal_kill_threshold_crossing: Tests threshold crossing
  identification (TTY as tipping factor)

Total test count now 27, all passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
